pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="989" x="360" y="8310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Failure Detection (15 Seconds)</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="283" x="385" y="8320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=3;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Failover Triggered</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">promotedNodes.add('node-d')</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Status: FAILED_OVER</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Per-key promotion:</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Each key routes to</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">first healthy replica</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="278.5" x="1048" y="8350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=3;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Health Monitor</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">t=0s: ping fail #1</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">t=5s: ping fail #2</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">t=10s: ping fail #3</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">DECLARE FAILED</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="278.5" x="688.5" y="8365" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=3;fillColor=#fad9d5;strokeColor=default;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">docker stop node_d</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">────────</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Node goes offline</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="223.5" x="385" y="8390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="5" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="850" y="8550" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="8500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="4" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="850" y="8550" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="8500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
